stemHtml: The captain of an aircraft executes the descent checklist by heart without refering to the checklist. This is a violation of the SOPs. How should the first officer react according to TEM model?

options.a: Inform captain about the violation and insist on doing the checklist again properly, so nothing is missed.
options.b: Wait for a more appropriate phase of flight, confront the captain and after landing report violation to the safety department.
options.c: Ignore the violation since the captain has more experience and trust that everything is under control.
options.d: Perform the checklist silently without informing the captain to avoid any potential confrontation during the flight.
